EXPLANATION: The model page at `https://huggingface.co/meta-llama/Llama-3.1-8B` is a real, dedicated Hugging Face model card published by Meta (under the `meta-llama` organization). The automated checker's "author mismatch" (citing "Hugging Face" instead of "Meta") is a metadata extraction artifact — the page is hosted on Hugging Face but the model is owned and distributed by Meta, as confirmed by the license text and model card content. Citing the author as "Meta" is correct and appropriate.
LINK: https://huggingface.co/meta-llama/Llama-3.1-8B
FOUND_TITLE: meta-llama/Llama-3.1-8B
FOUND_AUTHORS: Meta
FOUND_YEAR: 2024
VERDICT: UNLIKELY
